channel.title: Japanese on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Japanese on Arrans github.io

item.title: lingdojo/kana-dojo
item.description: Aesthetic, minimalist platform for learning Japanese inspired by Duolingo and Monkeytype, built with Next.js and sponsored by Vercel. Beginner-friendly with plenty of good first issues - all contributions are welcome!

item.title: kha-white/mokuro
item.description: Read Japanese manga inside browser with selectable text.

item.title: polm/fugashi
item.description: A Cython MeCab wrapper for fast, pythonic Japanese tokenization and morphological analysis.
